trivia_bullets.text: Anointed Chorister is a common from Core Set 2021 (M21, released 2020-07-03). Core sets in this era were plane-agnostic beginner products. The Chorister has no named plane or character identity in any official Wizards source — she is a generic Human Cleric of white mana.

A 1/1 Human Cleric for one white mana with lifelink; pump ability {4}{W}: +3/+3 until end of turn. EDHREC rank: 21,198 — modest Commander uptake in lifegain strategies. Legal in Pauper where 1-mana lifelink bodies are occasionally relevant in white aggro shells.

Flavor text: 'I sing of benevolence and mercy, of golden wings bringing comfort to the meek and downtrodden.' — First-person speaker is the depicted chorister. The phrase 'meek and downtrodden' is unusually candid about class position for standard Wizards flavor copy.

Artist Bastien Lecouffe-Deharme (credited as Bastien L. Deharme) debuted in MTG with Battle for Zendikar (2015) and has approximately 86 credited cards per Gatherer. Best known for dark/gothic/surrealist work (Liliana, Heretical Healer; Olivia Voldaren; Animate Dead). Anointed Chorister is a notable tonal departure — warm, devotional, luminous rather than shadowed.
sources: Gatherer: artist search Bastien L. Deharme (via WebSearch)
